nasb.text: For assuredly He does not give help to angels, but He gives help to the descendant of Abraham.

esv.text: For surely it is not angels that he helps, but he helps the offspring of Abraham.

cnv.text: 其實，他並沒有救援天使，只救援亞伯拉罕的後裔。

ccb.text: 很明显，祂要救助的不是天使，而是亚伯拉罕的后裔。

csbs.text: 显然，他并不是要救拔天使，而是救拔亚伯拉罕的后裔。
